name: rizum-agent-guidelines

interface.shortDescription: Structured planning and documentation rules for coding agents
interface.longDescription: Use Rizum Agent Guidelines when coding agents need mandatory planning docs, living to-do lists, syntax-only self-verification, and Chinese change summaries.
